title: From MCP to Scale: Pipelines That Build Themselves — Rafael Levi, Bright Data
summary: Rafael Levi presents Bright Data's MCP (Model Context Protocol) for automating web scraping pipelines. Agents use MCP to inspect site structure, generate production scrapers, and repair broken jobs automatically. The approach reduces token usage and moves from one-off extraction to scalable, self-maintaining pipelines.
